entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the crop being studied for insect resistance

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE-STERILITY
entities.description: A genetic condition used to facilitate the production of hybrid crops

entities.name: HETEROTIC POTENTIAL
entities.description: The ability of hybrid offspring to exhibit superior traits compared to their parents

entities.name: MILO A1 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic type used in the development of sorghum hybrids

entities.name: A2 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic type used in sorghum hybrids, particularly in China

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: The geographical region where A2 cytoplasm-based sorghum hybrids are developed

entities.name: SHOOT BUG
entities.description: Peregrinus maidis, an insect pest that attacks sorghum

entities.name: SUGARCANE APHID
entities.description: Melanaphis sacchari, an insect pest that attacks sorghum

entities.name: SPOTTED STEM BORER
entities.description: Chilo partellus, an insect pest that attacks sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to withstand or repel insect pests

entities.name: INSECT-RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genetic sequences that confer resistance to insect pests in sorghum

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A comprehensive approach to controlling pests using biological, cultural, and chemical tools
